description: Page routing, 404 handling, and cross-page navigation.

workflows.name: Unknown route shows 404 page
steps: Verify the page shows 'Page not found'.
Verify a 'Back to Home' link is visible.
Verify redirect to / (which then redirects based on auth state).

workflows.name: Health endpoint responds with status shape
steps: Verify response body contains status as 'ok' or 'error'.
Verify response body contains db.latencyMs as a number.
